## Summary
<!-- One sentence: what does this PR do and why? -->

## Linked Issues
<!-- Closes #, Refs # -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Research / docs only
- [ ] New feature (behind feature flag)
- [ ] New feature (ready to ship)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Trunk-Based Dev Checklist
- [ ] Branch is short-lived (< 2 days from `main`)
- [ ] Incomplete features are behind a feature flag
- [ ] No merge commits; rebased onto latest `main`
- [ ] CI passes (build + tests)
- [ ] New code has tests, or the reason is explained
- [ ] No private learning content, source excerpts, secrets, or unsafe workflow permissions were introduced

## Testing
<!-- How was this tested? Simulator? Device? Unit tests? -->
